notes: v0.3.6: Video clip recording on the Record button. When Video is on, Record now captures a composited peer+self WebM with local mic audio and saves it to your recording folder. Self-view is a mirrored PIP in whichever corner the jamsync watermark isn't currently in — the watermark rotates between all four corners every 5 seconds, TikTok-style, so it can't be cropped off. When Video is off, Record behaves exactly like before (Rust WAV). Known limits this release: peer audio not yet in video clips (v0.3.7), rolling 30/60s buttons still audio-only (v0.3.7), animated end-card branding with jamsync_tag sound is v0.3.8.
